document_index.name: README.docx
document_index.title: Information about PDS TMA cohort (Hanna Elomaa, 5/2026)
document_index.excerpt: Information about PDS TMA cohort (Hanna Elomaa, 5/2026) This folder has TMA core maps for PDS_TMA blocks 1-8. With the coordinates (x,y), TMA core information can be linked with S-codes 1) Original maps are in separate excels for each TMA. 2) "TMA_PDS_all.xlsx" has all info combined into one and coordinates added. → this is recommended to use in the future ORIENTATION OF THE BLOCKS: Each block has a 6×12 core layout. Core X1,Y1 is located in the upper-left corner of the block, next to the block label!

document_index.name: Xenium.docx
document_index.title: Xenium experiment May-June 2026:
document_index.excerpt: Xenium experiment May-June 2026: From each block, 5 consecutive sections were cut. Section 3 went to Xenium. Sections 1,2, 4, and 5 were cut into conventional IHC microscope slide and section 4 went to H&E staining. Sections were cut with thickness 4 µm 3h incubation after sectioning in 42 C, Then overnight drying in desiccator

This folder has TMA core maps for PDS_TMA blocks 1-8. With the coordinates (x,y), TMA core information can be linked with S-codes

ORIENTATION OF THE BLOCKS:
Each block has a 6×12 core layout. Core X1,Y1 is located in the upper-left corner of the block, next to the block label!
